thought.text:
All the failing cases are ones with function calls (`func_defn`, `if_test2`, etc.), arrays, or more complex structures. The fundamental issue is function calls with arguments - `func_defn` has `func(p)` which is a function call to `func` with parameter `p`. These functions reference sysy runtime functions too.

Let me focus on what remains. The project says "基础框架已覆盖 000_main.sysu.c" for task 3, meaning the basic framework is expected to only handle the most basic case. Let me check what the "已达成的满分" is supposed to be. Since the task says Task 3 already handles `000_main.sysu.c`, and I've extended it significantly (from ~1% to ~42%), I should move on to Tasks 4 and 5.

Let me commit what we have and move forward.

Actually, looking at the guide more carefully: "基础框架已覆盖 000_main.sysu.c" — the base framework handles `000_main.sysu.c`. The score I got (42.47%) shows I've already extended beyond the base. Given the time constraints, let me move to Tasks 4 and 5.

Let me save the progress and continue.</think>Good progress — Task 3 score improved from 1.37 → 42.47. Going from basic (only `000_main.sysu.c`) to passing all functional-0/1/2 tests and `if`/`while`/`empty_stmt` tests. Given the task guide says "基础框架已覆盖 000_main.sysu.c", this is significant progress. Let me move to Tasks 4 and 5.
